taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Data Analytics, Dashboard Building, Python, SQL, Data Pipelines
skill_match_scores: Data Analytics:1.0, Dashboard Building:1.0, Python:1.0, SQL:1.0, Data Pipelines:0.5
must_have_quals: Bachelor's Degree or equivalent experience in a Computer Science, Data Analysis or business-related field, Corporate Data Analyst: 1+ years' experience working with and providing data analytics, reporting and dashboard building for company consumption, Senior Corporate Data Analyst: 3+ years' experience working with and providing analytics and reporting to leadership including executive level, Technical experience using data manipulation tools and development languages, including Python and SQL, Superior communication skills, Strong project ownership and attention to detail skills with the ability to be a self-starter, Knowledge of and experience with data pipelines and ETL processes, Prior experience working with data engineers and understanding of technical requirements
preferred_quals: Experience with Databricks, Thoughtspot, and other data lake / warehouse and analytics tools
core_responsibilities: Develops, manages, and optimizes BI solutions, including data models, dashboards, and reports, Acts as owner of company wide data warehouse in regard to maintenance, availability of systems data, and coordination of data integration engineers when needed, Works with stakeholders, including cross departments, to gather and document requirements for BI projects, enhancements, and reporting, Utilizes data visualization, statistical analysis, and reporting skills to present data to stakeholders in a meaningful way, Uses data analysis techniques to extract information and identify patterns or trends, Builds reports and reconcile to system data, on both a regular cadence and ad-hoc requests, Develops and maintains documentation of data sources, models, and processes, Provides training and support to end-users on BI tools and reports, Stays current with BI industry trends and best practices, Applies basic development skills working with Python, SQL Queries, etc. to extract business insights around finance, business operations and more
job_summary: Origami Risk is a company that provides single-platform SaaS solutions for risk management. They are seeking a (Senior) Corporate Data Analyst who will collaborate with stakeholders to develop a new internal data warehouse, manage data analysis, and present insights in an accessible format.
